p.b: This code system defines the following properties for its concepts

tr.td: Launch date of mission (actual or planned)

div.p: This case-sensitive code system http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/aerospace/CodeSystem/artemis-mission-cs defines the following codes:

tr.td: Uncrewed test flight of Orion and SLS around the Moon. Launched Nov 16, 2022. Status: completed. Target: Lunar orbit and return.
First crewed lunar flyby mission of Artemis program. Planned ~2026. Status: planned. Target: Lunar flyby (crewed).
Crewed low-Earth orbit test flight preparing systems for future lunar landings. Planned ~2027. Status: planned. Target: LEO test flight (crewed).
Lunar Gateway assembly mission with landing. Planned ~2028. Status: planned. Target: Gateway assembly + landing.
Lunar landing with new lander and Lunar Terrain Vehicle. Planned ~2030. Status: planned. Target: Lunar landing (new lander, LTV rover).
Placeholder entry for Artemis VI mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis VII mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis VIII mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis IX mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis X mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XI mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XII mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XIII mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XIV mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XV mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XVI mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XVII mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XVIII mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XIX mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XX mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XXI mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XXII mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XXIII mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XXIV mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XXV mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XXVI mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XXVII mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XXVIII mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XXIX mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.
Placeholder entry for Artemis XXX mission used for simulation, planning, and forecasting.

description.value: Historical and planned Artemis program missions with target destinations, launch dates, and status
Launch date of mission (actual or planned)

definition.value: Uncrewed test flight of Orion and SLS around the Moon. Launched Nov 16, 2022. Status: completed. Target: Lunar orbit and return.

value.value: Status: completed | Target: Lunar orbit and return (uncrewed test) | Launch: 2022-11-16

definition.value: First crewed lunar flyby mission of Artemis program. Planned ~2026. Status: planned. Target: Lunar flyby (crewed).

value.value: Status: planned | Target: Lunar flyby (crewed) | Launch: ~2026

definition.value: Crewed low-Earth orbit test flight preparing systems for future lunar landings. Planned ~2027. Status: planned. Target: LEO test flight (crewed).

value.value: Status: planned | Target: LEO test flight (crewed) | Launch: ~2027

definition.value: Lunar Gateway assembly mission with landing. Planned ~2028. Status: planned. Target: Gateway assembly + landing.

value.value: Status: planned | Target: Lunar Gateway assembly + landing | Launch: ~2028

definition.value: Lunar landing with new lander and Lunar Terrain Vehicle. Planned ~2030. Status: planned. Target: Lunar landing (new lander, LTV rover).

value.value: Status: planned | Target: Lunar landing (new lander, LTV rover) | Launch: ~2030

value.value: Status: planned | Placeholder mission entry for simulation and forecasting
